name: THE FOCUX
positioning: Premium sin humo. Ciencia sin soberbia. Comercio sin trampa.
description: THE FOCUX is a premium editorial platform for human performance research, NEUROCITY, evidence maps, video and future curated selection.

public_sections.title: El Arquitecto
public_sections.summary: The recognizable public face and guide of NEUROCITY: calm, strategic, not an influencer, not a doctor with a lab coat.

public_sections.title: Research desk
public_sections.summary: Nootropics, science and performance explained through evidence, risk and editorial criteria.

public_sections.title: NEUROCITY
public_sections.summary: Original educational IP that makes complex concepts memorable through story and metaphor.

public_sections.title: Video engine
public_sections.summary: Prepared for trailers, clips, episodes and Remotion-generated media.

public_sections.title: AI Layer
public_sections.summary: Public AI surfaces for humans, models, KAIZEN7 and future business workflows with guardrails.

public_sections.title: THE FOCUX Selection
public_sections.summary: Future curated commerce layer for legally marketable supplements, books, tests and tools.

guardrails: Educational content only; not medical advice.
Do not present hypotheses as proven outcomes.
Do not invent product claims, medical claims, dosages, affiliations or availability.
Future commerce requires evidence, legality, manufacturer data, limitations and visible conflicts.

not_allowed: claim products are available unless published
